content.en:
Subsequently.

The Ten Elements Ancestor revealed the name of the place where the white stone of life was abundant—the White Bone Abyss!

Airplanes!!!

The Ten Elements Ancestor tore apart the space-time passage, spanning the endless time-space and connecting the White Bone Abyss.

After opening this passage, the Ten Elements Ancestor gave Ye Tian a mark, and this mark stored enough energy to break a passage again.

When Ye Tian wants to come back, just urge the imprint directly.

"Master, the disciple has gone!"

Ye Tian took his leave.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked into the space-time passage and teleported for a long time before arriving at another place.

"It's so far!"

Ye Tian sensed the distance from the main body, and it was very blurry, which showed how far away he had come.

If you rely on flying, you don't know how many years will be consumed in the middle of the journey, and it's easy to get lost, and you can't find the direction at all, even if you have the induction of the body, it's useless, because you won't be able to fly out of a certain area.

In addition, some areas can be very dangerous, and if you are not careful, you will die.

Therefore, Ye Tian's only way was to go back through the mark given by his master.

......

As soon as he came to the White Bone Abyss, a suction seemed to be draining his life force, but he forcibly suppressed the situation.

For Bai Guyuan, Ye Tian came for the first time, but Shizun also briefly talked about the situation here.

The White Bone Abyss is very special, it will continue to attract some nearby Realm Realm Lifeforms, thus absorbing their life power, and gradually giving birth to some Life White Stones.

For a long time, Bai Guyuan didn't know how many lives he had absorbed and how many life white stones had been born.

It was also the fact that the existence of the master would not lack the life white stone, so he informed him of such a treasure.

Of course, the White Bone Abyss also has dangers, such as those powerful realm life forms that can resist the White Bone Abyss's devouring, and among them, there may be special lives comparable to those of the Ten Realm-level masters.

And there are still some devouring time and space in the White Bone Abyss that even the Ten Realm-level controllers will devour, once they are devoured, the Ten Realm-level controllers can't bear it, and all the physical vitality is devoured, turning into a pile of white bones.

Other than that, there is no danger.

Therefore, Ye Tian only needed to pay attention to those extremely powerful Realm Realm Lifeforms, as well as Devouring Time and Space.

"I perceived the white stones of life, and there are dozens of them!"

Ye Tian flew to the front and quickly took out dozens of life white stones from the ground.

As soon as he came here, he found so many life white stones, which is worthy of being the place of life white stones specially prepared for him by Shizun.

If he had asked him to look for it himself, he wouldn't have found it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian slowly searched, and every once in a while he could find some life white stones, and he harvested more and more, and soon surpassed his previous harvest in Tianhu Sea.

Of course, it was impossible for Ye Tian to leave here now, because he could only come once, and it was impossible for Shizun to continue to send him over.

As time passed, Ye Tian gained more, but sometimes he would encounter some extremely powerful Realm Realm Life.

Almost all of these realm-level beings have reached the level of the Nine Realms master, otherwise they would not be able to withstand the devouring of the White Bone Abyss.

The white bone abyss, which devours life all the time, can only be carried by such a powerful life.

this day.

Ye Tian saw an incredible scene, a life similar to an ape, its aura was not even much weaker than Ye Tian, and when the other party saw Ye Tian and was about to attack, he fell directly into a black hole and was gradually swallowed up.

"Devouring Time and Space!"

Ye Tian's brows furrowed.

This is a powerful life comparable to that of a Ten Realms-level master, and it can't hold on for a few seconds before it is swallowed up by Devouring Time and Space, and there is no escape.

The point is, without perceiving the slightest fluctuation, it suddenly appears and swallows it.

This strange situation, even Ye Tian didn't know how to deal with it.

He was also afraid that if his replica body was devoured, then he would not be able to bring back these life white stones.

"You must condense the will clone, let the will clone go to find the life white stone, and my replica body will stay outside the white bone abyss!" Ye Tian decided.

He can't be blamed for being so careful, he really can't afford to lose.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the outside of the White Bone Abyss, stayed at the edge, and then began to slowly condense the will clone, he was not afraid of delaying time.

I have to say that it is very slow to reunite the will clone, and if the will clone is killed, the speed of condensation will be even slower, and the cost will be very high, and even the will recovery will take a long time.

Moreover, if a person's will clone falls many times, it will hurt the foundation, and it will even be permanently unable to condense.

But for Ye Tian, it's nothing, he can even copy his body and recondense it again and again, what is the will clone?

The years passed, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally condensed the will clone, and asked this will clone to find the life white stone, and after finding a certain life white stone, he sent it back here.

In this way, Ye Tian found a large number of life white stones.

However, on this day, Ye Tian's will clone was on the way to find the White Stone of Life, and suddenly encountered the unknown Devouring Time and Space.

Rumble!!!

Devouring time and space swallowed Ye Tian into it, no matter how he manipulated time and space shuttle, he couldn't break the power of time and space that devoured time and space, and he was dragged into it little by little.

But.

After entering the Devouring Plane, his body was not crushed and devoured, although it was under unimaginable pressure.

"Devouring Mountain Constitution!"

Ye Tian understood.

It was the Devouring Mountain Physique that protected him!

Although this is a will clone, the will clone, like the real body, also has the Devouring Mountain physique, and the Devouring Mountain physique has a certain degree of compatibility with this Devouring Time and Space, resulting in the Devouring Time and Space here will not swallow Ye Tian so quickly.

This will clone will not die for the time being, and Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief and began to observe the situation around him.

He was shocked by this realization.

"It's ......"

Under his perception, he saw a huge network, like a vascular pipeline, and like a space-time pipeline.

Dense pipes spread all over the void, shrouding this space-time region.

He sensed the breath of life, and these pipes contained powerful life forces.

And each network is equivalent to a space-time channel.

Ye Tian immediately began to shuttle, following the pipeline to investigate the situation here, but his physical world was still collapsing, but the speed of collapse was not too fast.

Time passed slowly, and finally he sensed the terrifying life force, which was composed of countless light sources, like a heart connected to countless pipes.

And the terrifying devouring power came from there.

The next moment, Ye Tian's will clone shattered!

Outside the abyss.

Ye Tian's expression changed.

"The clone of the will has fallen!"

Still, he understood the situation and had a guess in his mind.

"Isn't Bai Guyuan a life?"
